# Free Room Planner

> Free, browser-based room and floor planning tool for homeowners. Draw floor plans to scale, place furniture, and export to PDF — no sign-up, no download, no payment.

## Core tools
- [Home — draw a floor plan](https://freeroomplanner.com/)
- [Room planner](https://freeroomplanner.com/room-planner)
- [Kitchen planner](https://freeroomplanner.com/kitchen-planner)
- [Bathroom planner](https://freeroomplanner.com/bathroom-planner)
- [Bedroom planner](https://freeroomplanner.com/bedroom-planner)
- [Living room planner](https://freeroomplanner.com/living-room-planner)
- [Floor plan maker](https://freeroomplanner.com/floor-plan-maker)
- [How it works](https://freeroomplanner.com/how-it-works)
- [Blog](https://freeroomplanner.com/blog)
